summary: The diff modifies frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx to implement all five layout/spacing requirements. The file-summary confirms: responsive grid (1/2/3 columns), items-start for top-alignment, dynamic height (no fixed heights), uniform p-6 padding, consistent internal spacing (mb-3 icon, mb-2 title, mb-4 description, space-y-2 feature list), and preserved colors/branding. All REQ-67 through REQ-71 appear implemented. Only Services.tsx was modified, respecting the constraint.
